title: Genshin Impact: New Primogems Codes
description: Grab these NEW Genshin Impact: Primogems Codes before they expire and unlock several in-game items for Genshin Impact including Primogems, ora, Hero's Wit and much more!
instructions:
1. Click the get button to access the coupon codes list provided by our sister site GamerCoins.
2. Redeem all the codes!
3. Have fun!

title: Carlos the Taco (IndieGala) Giveaway
description: Become the Taco! Finally, a free game made for taco fans! Download Carlos the Taco for free on IndieGala. Carlos the Taco is a 2D platformer set in Mexico where you play as a taco!
instructions:
1. Click the button to visit the giveaway page.
2. Login into your free IndieGala account.
3. Scroll down and click the "Add to Your Library" button to add the game to your library.
4. Go to "My Library" to find your game.

title: 8AM (Steam) Giveaway
description: Score 8AM for free via Steam! "8AM" is a 3d first-person suspense game where you find yourself trapped in a room, watching a family through cameras.
instructions:
1. Click the button to visit the giveaway page.
2. Download this game directly via Steam before the offer expires.
3. That´s it! Have fun!

title: 911 Operator (Mobile) Giveaway
description:
911 Operator is free this week on the Epic Games Store App for iPhone, iPad, and Android.

Note: May not be available in all regions
instructions:

2. Install the Epic Games Store App on your Android or iOS device.
3. Open the App, scroll down to the "Free Games" section and click on the giveaway banner.
4. Install the game and have fun!
